zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope於大約1196年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope27歲，母親Isabella Basset25歲。他於1208年11月30日與Alice de Beaumont在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1257年2月14日之前在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope于大约1196年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope27岁，母亲Isabella Basset25岁。他于1208年11月30日与Alice de Beaumont在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1257年2月14日之前在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope was born about 1196, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, was 27 and his mother, Isabella Basset, was 25. He married Alice de Beaumont on 30 November 1208, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 14 February 1257, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope est né environ 1196, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabella Basset, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Beaumont le 30 novembre 1208, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 14 février 1257, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope um 1196 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope 27 und seine Mutter Isabella Basset 25. Er hat am 30. November 1208 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 14. Februar 1257 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope è nato il circa 1196 nel Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Basset, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Beaumont il 30 novembre 1208, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 14 febbraio 1257, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mauduit Lord of Hanslopeが約1196年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslopeは27歳，母Isabella Bassetは25歳であった。1208年11月30日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペでAlice de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1257年2月14日以前にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope(이)가 대략 1196년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Basset(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1208년 11월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 Alice de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 2월 14일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope nasceu aproximadamente 1196, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Basset, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Beaumont em 30 de novembro de 1208, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 14 de fevereiro de 1257, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope родился около 1196 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Basset, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Beaumont 30 ноября 1208 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 14 февраль 1257 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope nació aproximadamente 1196, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabella Basset, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice de Beaumont el 30 de noviembre de 1208, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 14 de febrero de 1257, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
